calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Establishing Revocable Living Trust And Confirming Trust Assets Probate Code 850 Et Seq
Off Calendar Mar-24-2026 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mary Gemma O'Keffe appeared for Jeannie King (petitioner).

At Counsels request the matter is ordered taken off calendar.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported

Petition For Order Establishing Revocable Living Trust And Confirming Trust Assets Probate Code 850 Et Seq
Off Calendar Feb-03-2026 Continued To Mar-24-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mary Gamma O'Keeffe appeared via zoom for Jeannie King (petitioner).
Mike Woods appeared via zoom for Colin King (objector).

Ms. O'Keeffe stated that her client may have additional information from decedent's computer, and that she is requesting additional time to do a diligent search. Mr. Woods stated he had no objection to a continuance.

The matter is continued to March 24, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Obitinalla. Not reported.

Petition For Order Establishing Revocable Living Trust And Confirming Trust Assets Probate Code 850 Et Seq
Off Calendar Dec-24-2025 Continued To Feb-03-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Gemma O'Keefe for petitioner Jeannie King (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Petition for Order Establishing Revocable Living Trust and Confirming Trust Assets.

Ms. O'Keefe explained that drafts of the trust had been prepared following meetings with Mr. and Mrs. King in 2021 and again in May 2025, and that Mr. King had intended to finalize the trust shortly before his unexpected passing. She stated she had emails and other communications from the parties demonstrating clear intent to create the trust.

Following discussion, the Court continued the matter to February 3, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, to allow time for Ms. O'Keefe to submit additional materials in support of the petition.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

Petition For Order Establishing Revocable Living Trust And Confirming Trust Assets Probate Code 850 Et Seq
Off Calendar Nov-12-2025 Continued To Dec-24-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
